zodiac.description: French manufacturer and inventor of the inflatable and RIB boat, offering recreational, professional, and military-grade inflatables and rigid inflatables for over 125 years.

zodiac-milpro.description: Zodiac Milpro builds professional-grade rigid and soft inflatable boats for military, law enforcement, search and rescue, and commercial operators worldwide.

zodiac-hurricane.description: Zodiac Hurricane Technologies designs heavy-duty aluminum-hull RIBs for professional, government, and commercial missions requiring maximum durability and payload.

highfield.description: Global RIB manufacturer known for aluminum-hull tenders and sport boats, from compact roll-up models to patrol and adventure lines up to 10 meters.

ab-inflatables.description: AB Inflatables builds aluminum-hull RIBs and inflatables for yacht tenders, fishing, diving, and commercial use, with models from compact tenders to large center consoles.

brig.description: European RIB builder fusing aeronautical engineering with marine craftsmanship, offering hand-built rigid inflatables from compact tenders to high-performance sport boats.

grand.description: Grand Inflatables produces aluminum-hull RIBs and inflatables for leisure, fishing, and commercial use, with a focus on value and practical layouts.

grand-inflatables.description: Grand Inflatables produces aluminum-hull RIBs and inflatables for leisure, fishing, and commercial use, with a focus on value and practical layouts.

achilles.description: Achilles Inflatable Craft manufactures Hypalon and PVC inflatables and RIBs for recreation, fishing, and commercial applications from compact tenders to large sport boats.

ranieri.description: Italian builder of RIBs, inflatables, and small fiberglass boats for leisure and professional use, with a wide range of center-console and open layouts.

caribe.description: Caribe Inflatables builds Hypalon RIBs and soft-bottom inflatables for yacht tenders, resort fleets, diving, and general recreation.

gala.description: Gala Boats manufactures PVC and Hypalon inflatables and aluminum-hull RIBs for tenders, fishing, and family boating at accessible price points.

walker-bay.description: Walker Bay is known for Generation 3 and 4 rigid inflatable tenders plus dinghy and utility inflatables designed for yacht owners and coastal boaters.

williams-jet-tenders.description: Williams Jet Tenders builds premium jet-driven RIB tenders engineered for superyachts, combining jet propulsion with luxury finishes and stable handling.

novurania.description: Novurania produces heavy-duty RIBs and inflatables for yacht tenders, military, and professional operators, with a reputation for rugged construction.

bombard.description: Bombard is a long-standing inflatable boat brand in the Zodiac group, offering affordable PVC and Hypalon inflatables for leisure and utility use.

takacat.description: Takacat builds foldable and lightweight catamaran-style inflatables and RIBs that pack down for easy storage on smaller vessels and trailers.

sea-eagle.description: Sea Eagle manufactures portable PVC inflatables including kayaks, fishing boats, and RIB-style models designed for easy transport and setup.

honwave.description: Honwave, a Honda Marine brand, offers PVC inflatables and aluminum-hull RIBs as practical tenders and family boats with emphasis on reliability and value.

suzumar.description: Suzumar is a Finnish inflatable boat manufacturer producing aluminum-hull RIBs and soft inflatables for Nordic and European leisure and utility markets.

mercury-inflatables.description: Mercury Inflatables offers PVC and Hypalon inflatables and RIBs designed to pair with Mercury outboards for tenders and general recreational boating.

saturn.description: Saturn Inflatables supplies PVC and Hypalon inflatables, kayaks, and RIBs for budget-conscious boaters, outfitters, and commercial rental fleets.

stryker.description: Stryker Boats builds aluminum-hull RIBs and inflatables for fishing, diving, and utility work with an emphasis on durable, no-frills layouts.

true-kit.description: True Kit manufactures kit-set and ready-built aluminum RIBs and inflatables in New Zealand, popular with DIY builders and commercial operators.

maxxon.description: Maxxon Inflatables produces PVC and Hypalon inflatables and RIBs for tenders, fishing, and recreation with a focus on practical, affordable designs.

inmar.description: Inmar Inflatable Boats builds Hypalon RIBs and soft inflatables for yacht tenders, resort fleets, and commercial operators on the U.S. West Coast.

newport.description: Newport Vessels sells PVC inflatables, RIBs, and electric outboards aimed at anglers, families, and first-time boaters seeking affordable packages.

west-marine.description: West Marine offers house-brand inflatables and RIBs alongside marine retail products, targeting cruisers and coastal boaters who want ready-to-use tender solutions.

aqua-marina.description: Aqua Marina manufactures portable PVC inflatables including kayaks, SUPs, and small motor boats designed for easy storage and recreational paddling.

avon.description: Avon Marine, part of the Zodiac group, builds professional and recreational RIBs and inflatables with a heritage in rescue, military, and yacht tender applications.

nrs.description: NRS designs inflatable kayaks, catarafts, and packrafts for river running and outdoor adventure, with a strong following among whitewater and expedition paddlers.

seabright.description: SeaBright Boats builds aluminum-hull RIBs and small craft for fishing and utility use, with practical layouts for coastal and inshore operators.

vanguard.description: Vanguard Marine manufactures aluminum-hull RIBs and inflatables for commercial, government, and recreational customers requiring rugged, work-ready boats.
